response.overview: Mina is a farmer who makes some of the finest cheese you will ever taste. Through sheer persistence and relentless, round-the-clock work, she has managed to preserve her herd and her farm for more than thirty years. She has weathered the turbulent post-Communist transition, constant bureaucratic pressure, bird flu, and African swine fever.  Today, Mina faces a choice: whether to leave behind the life she has built and step into a new role – that of a grandmother in Martha’s Vineyard, a luxury island off the U.S. East Coast.
response.title: A Few Chunks of Cheese
